hero.tagline: If you can't explain it, you probably haven't designed it yet.

about.p1: I'm a Full Stack developer with 8+ years building <products>digital products</products>, with a deep background in <design>design</design>.
about.p2: I've led projects for brands in hospitality, retail, telecom, mining, and entertainment. I'm the founder of <hyper>Hyper™</hyper>, where I operate as developer and product owner.
about.p3: What defines me most is that everything converges in my work: brands that function, interfaces that feel right, and technologies that sustain it all.

cards.stack_desc: Technologies I've worked with and use on a daily basis
cards.experience_desc: Professional background and companies I've worked with

drawer_about.degree1_school: Universidad Nacional Experimental de Guayana (UNEG), Venezuela (2009–2014)

algomas.p: I also <run>run</run>, <music>make music</music>, <photo>take photos</photo>, <film>film things</film>, and more. I've realized that all of it eventually ends up influencing how I build something.

cta.text: Let's build something great together — coffee's on me.

preloader.phrase: If you can't explain it, you probably haven't designed it yet

meta.title: Luis García — Product Engineer · Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Luis García, Product Engineer and Full Stack Developer based in Santiago, Chile. Web development, e-commerce, and end-to-end product design.
